title: ElderGuard
description: ElderGuard is a medieval fantasy RPG modpack that brings knights, magic, and adventure to Minecraft. Explore vast kingdoms, conquer dungeons, and uncover powerful relics in a world of danger and discovery.
body:
**ElderGuard**

is a medieval fantasy **RPG** modpack that transforms Minecraft into a world of **knights**, **sorcery**, and **epic exploration**. Focused on immersive gameplay and rich world-building, it blends RPG systems, intense combat, and deep fantasy themes into one cohesive experience.

**Key Features**:

**RPG Mechanics** – Choose from different playable races and classes, each with unique abilities, just like in classic MMORPGs. Progress through More RPG Classes, track stats and equipment with RPG-HUD, and unlock powerful perks with Trinkets.



**Magic & Sorcery** – Cast powerful spells and harness the elements through Elemental Wizards, Spell Power, Wizards, and the dark magic of Necronomicon and Runes.

**Enhanced Combat** – Battles are more engaging with Better Combat, Combat Roll, and expanded weaponry from Ranged Weapon API and Ninja Armor.

**Expansive World Generation** – Explore massive, handcrafted structures and natural wonders with Yung’s Better Dungeons, Strongholds, Mineshafts, Witch Huts, Ocean Monuments, and Tectonic terrain.

**Immersive Atmosphere** – Realistic sounds from Ambient Sounds and Sound Physics Remastered, paired with visuals from Presence Footsteps and Enhanced Block Entities, create a deeply atmospheric world.

**Medieval Building & Exploration** – Construct and decorate medieval towns using Fabric Medieval Buildings, Architecture Mods, and rich decoration tools like Improved Mob Heads and Jewelry.

**Smooth Exploration & Realism** – Quality-of-life features like No Double Tap Sprint, StepUp, Shoulder Surfing, and Not Enough Animations make movement feel natural and immersive.

**Legendary Loot** – Discover unique gear and artifacts with Relics, Legendary Tooltips, Additional RPG Jewelry, and more as you conquer dungeons and uncover secrets.

**Living Villages & AI** – Villagers have more personality and variety thanks to Villager Names, Villages and Pillages, and Player Animation Library.

**Performance & UI Tweaks** – Optimized with Lithium, ImmediatelyFast, Debugify, and UI-friendly mods like Slot Customization, Inventory HUD, and Your Reputation.
